chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. CONST. PETITION No. D-5407 OF 2013 Date Order with signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 32976/2013 2. For hearing of Main Case 27.09.2021. None present for the Petitioner..... None present. Same was the position on 20.04.2018 and 14.01.2020, besides, no intimation is available on record to explain the absence of the Petitioner and his counsel. It seems that the Petitioner is reluctant to advance the cause of these proceedings or lost his interest. Petition alongwith listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Amjad/PS
